nodes.name: Webhook: Bridge TX
nodes.notes: Option A (preferred): Receives POST from Tracker/FastAPI when a bridge tx exceeds threshold. Expected payload: { tx_hash, amount_tao, source_chain, dest_chain, timestamp, explorer_url }

nodes.name: Cron: Every 15min
nodes.notes: Option B (fallback): Poll every 15 minutes. DISABLED by default. Enable if webhook not available.

nodes.name: Fetch Recent Txs
nodes.notes: Only used with Cron trigger. Fetches recent bridge transactions from Tracker/FastAPI.

nodes.name: Amount >= Threshold?
nodes.notes: Only alert for transactions above BRIDGE_TX_THRESHOLD (default: 100 TAO)

nodes.name: Deduplicate
nodes.notes: Prevent duplicate alerts. Keeps last 500 tx hashes in state file.

nodes.name: Format Alert Tweet
nodes.notes: Format bridge tx into tweet. Includes explorer link if it fits within 280 chars.

nodes.name: Post Tweet
nodes.notes: Post via configured API. Default: OpenTweet. Switch to X API or Outstand by updating POSTING_API env var and this node's URL/auth.

nodes.name: Discord Notify
nodes.notes: Notify Vew of posted bridge alert.
